hooks.command: QDIR=/Users/akhilkarra/ode/eigenq/quant-proofs; branch=$(git -C "$QDIR" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; repo=$(cd "$QDIR" && gh repo view --json nameWithOwner --jq '.nameWithOwner' 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; sleep 20; end=$((SECONDS+640)); while [ $SECONDS -lt $end ]; do data=$(gh run list --repo "$repo" --branch "$branch" --limit 5 --json name,status,conclusion --jq '[.[] | {n:.name,s:(.conclusion//.status)}]' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$data" ] && sleep 15 && continue; pending=$(echo "$data" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(sum(1 for r in d if r['s'] in ('in_progress','queued','waiting')))"); failed=$(echo "$data" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(', '.join(r['n'] for r in d if r['s'] in ('failure','cancelled','timed_out')))"); if [ "$pending" = "0" ]; then if [ -n "$failed" ]; then echo "FAIL on $branch: $failed"; exit 2; else echo "PASS: all checks on $branch"; exit 2; fi; fi; sleep 15; done; echo "CI still running on $branch after 11 min"; exit 2

QDIR=/Users/akhilkarra/ode/eigenq/quant-proofs; repo=$(cd "$QDIR" && gh repo view --json nameWithOwner --jq '.nameWithOwner' 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; sleep 25; end=$((SECONDS+640)); while [ $SECONDS -lt $end ]; do data=$(gh run list --repo "$repo" --branch main --limit 5 --json name,status,conclusion --jq '[.[] | {n:.name,s:(.conclusion//.status)}]' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$data" ] && sleep 15 && continue; pending=$(echo "$data" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(sum(1 for r in d if r['s'] in ('in_progress','queued','waiting')))"); failed=$(echo "$data" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(', '.join(r['n'] for r in d if r['s'] in ('failure','cancelled','timed_out')))"); if [ "$pending" = "0" ]; then if [ -n "$failed" ]; then echo "FAIL on main: $failed"; exit 2; else echo "PASS: all checks on main"; exit 2; fi; fi; sleep 15; done; echo "CI still running on main after 11 min"; exit 2

QDIR=/Users/akhilkarra/ode/eigenq/quant-proofs; branch=$(git -C "$QDIR" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; repo=$(cd "$QDIR" && gh repo view --json nameWithOwner --jq '.nameWithOwner' 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; if gh api "repos/$repo/branches?protected=true&per_page=100" --jq '.[].name' 2>/dev/null | grep -qx "$branch"; then echo "BLOCK: '$branch' is a protected branch in $repo — push from a feature branch instead." >&2; exit 1; fi

python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
payload = json.load(sys.stdin)
content = payload.get('content', '') or payload.get('new_string', '')
patterns = [
    r'unofficial_academic_record',
    r'mfe-applications',
    r'Akhil Karra Resume',
    r'summer-2026-plan\.md',
    r'MSCF Class of',
]
for p in patterns:
    if re.search(p, content, re.IGNORECASE):
        print(f'BLOCK: private content pattern: {p}', file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)
"
